name: Irish Coffee II
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in the strong black coffee in an Irish coffee glass or a heat-resistant, non-metallic glass, cup, or mug. Do not use a glass with metallic trim.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 to 2 minutes, or until hot.
3. Stir in the Irish Whiskey.
4. Carefully float a spoonful of whipped cream on top.
